# nat-slider



<!-- Auto Generated Below -->


## Overview

Premium Range Slider component

## Properties

| Property   | Attribute  | Description    | Type      | Default |
| ---------- | ---------- | -------------- | --------- | ------- |
| `disabled` | `disabled` | Disabled state | `boolean` | `false` |
| `max`      | `max`      | Maximum value  | `number`  | `100`   |
| `min`      | `min`      | Minimum value  | `number`  | `0`     |
| `step`     | `step`     | Step size      | `number`  | `1`     |
| `value`    | `value`    | Current value  | `number`  | `0`     |


## Events

| Event       | Description                                 | Type                              |
| ----------- | ------------------------------------------- | --------------------------------- |
| `natChange` | Emitted when the value changes (on release) | `CustomEvent<{ value: number; }>` |
| `natInput`  | Emitted continuously during drag            | `CustomEvent<{ value: number; }>` |
